title: eryngium viviparum
intro: Eryngium viviparum, also known as Snowy Woodlock or Sea Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Eryngium viviparum can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
